prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund (SHDF) primarily targets social housing in England, as it is administered by the UK Government and specifically mentions regions within England. The fund does not extend to Scotland, Wales, or Northern Ireland, which have their own housing and energy efficiency policies.
